Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.text

Class FlixelText

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.FlixelBasic
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.FlixelObject
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.FlixelSprite
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.text.FlixelText
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Disposable, com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Pool.Poolable, FlixelDebugDrawable, FlixelDestroyable, FlixelDrawable, FlixelUpdatable
public class FlixelText extends FlixelSprite
A display object for rendering text on screen.

Extends FlixelSprite so that text objects can be added to sprite groups and states, with full support for tinting, fading, rotation, and scaling. Uses libGDX's BitmapFont for rendering and optionally FreeTypeFontGenerator for dynamic font generation from .ttf/.otf files.

Auto-sizing

By default, FlixelText auto-sizes to fit its text content. To use a fixed width, pass a positive fieldWidth to the constructor or call setFieldWidth(float). A fixed height can be set via setFieldHeight(float).

Fonts

The default font is libGDX's built-in bitmap font (Arial 15px), scaled to the requested size. For best quality at any size, supply a .ttf or .otf file via setFont(FileHandle), which uses FreeType to generate a crisp bitmap font at the exact pixel size requested.

Border Styles

Text can be rendered with borders via setBorderStyle(BorderStyle, Color, float, float). Supported styles are FlixelText.BorderStyle.SHADOW, FlixelText.BorderStyle.OUTLINE, and FlixelText.BorderStyle.OUTLINE_FAST.

Sprite Methods

Graphic-loading methods inherited from FlixelSprite are not applicable to text and will throw UnsupportedOperationException if called.

  • Constructor Details

    • FlixelText

      public FlixelText()
      Creates a new text object at (0, 0) with default settings.

    • FlixelText

      public FlixelText(float x, float y)
      Creates a new text object at the specified position.
      Parameters:
      x - The x position of the text.
      y - The y position of the text.

    • FlixelText

      public FlixelText(float x, float y, float fieldWidth)
      Creates a new text object at the specified position with a field width.
      Parameters:
      x - The x position of the text.
      y - The y position of the text.
      fieldWidth - The width of the text field. Auto-sizes if <= 0.

    • FlixelText

      public FlixelText(float x, float y, float fieldWidth, String text)
      Creates a new text object with position, field width, and initial text.
      Parameters:
      x - The x position of the text.
      y - The y position of the text.
      fieldWidth - The width of the text field. Auto-sizes if <= 0.
      text - The text to display initially.

    • FlixelText

      public FlixelText(float x, float y, float fieldWidth, String text, int size)
      Creates a new text object with all primary parameters.
      Parameters:
      x - The x position of the text.
      y - The y position of the text.
      fieldWidth - The width of the text field. Auto-sizes if <= 0.
      text - The text to display initially.
      size - The font size in pixels.

    • getTextBuffer

      public StringBuilder getTextBuffer()
      Returns the text currently being displayed.

    • setText

      public FlixelText setText(String text)
      Sets the text to display.

      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • setText

      public FlixelText setText(CharSequence text)

    • getTextSize

      public int getTextSize()
      Returns the font size in pixels.

    • setTextSize

      public FlixelText setTextSize(int size)
      Sets the font size in pixels. When using a FreeType font, this triggers font regeneration. When using the default font, the built-in bitmap font is scaled.
      Parameters:
      size - The new font size (minimum 1).
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • getAlignment

      public FlixelText.Alignment getAlignment()
      Returns the current text alignment.

    • setAlignment

      public FlixelText setAlignment(@NotNull @NotNull FlixelText.Alignment alignment)
      Sets the horizontal alignment of the text within the field. Only has a visible effect when isAutoSize() is false (i.e. the field has a fixed width).
      Parameters:
      alignment - The alignment to use.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • isWordWrap

      public boolean isWordWrap()
      Returns whether word wrapping is enabled.

    • setWordWrap

      public FlixelText setWordWrap(boolean wordWrap)
      Enables or disables word wrapping. Defaults to true.
      Parameters:
      wordWrap - Whether to wrap text at the field width.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • isAutoSize

      public boolean isAutoSize()
      Returns whether the text field auto-sizes to fit its content.

    • setAutoSize

      public FlixelText setAutoSize(boolean autoSize)
      Sets whether the text field auto-sizes to fit content. When true, getFieldWidth() and getFieldHeight() are determined automatically. Requires isWordWrap() to be false to take full effect.
      Parameters:
      autoSize - Whether to auto-size.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • getFieldWidth

      public float getFieldWidth()
      Returns the width of the text field, or 0 if auto-sizing.

    • setFieldWidth

      public FlixelText setFieldWidth(float fieldWidth)
      Sets the width of the text field. Enables auto-sizing if <= 0.
      Parameters:
      fieldWidth - The field width in pixels.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • getFieldHeight

      public float getFieldHeight()
      Returns the height of the text field, or 0 if auto-height.

    • setFieldHeight

      public FlixelText setFieldHeight(float fieldHeight)
      Sets the height of the text field. When <= 0, height is determined automatically from the text content. Has no effect when isAutoSize() is true.
      Parameters:
      fieldHeight - The field height in pixels.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • isBold

      public boolean isBold()
      Returns whether bold text is enabled.

    • setBold

      public FlixelText setBold(boolean bold)
      Sets whether to use bold text. Only takes visual effect when a .ttf font has been set via setFont(FileHandle), since the default bitmap font does not support runtime weight changes.
      Parameters:
      bold - Whether to use bold.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • isItalic

      public boolean isItalic()
      Returns whether italic text is enabled.

    • setItalic

      public FlixelText setItalic(boolean italic)
      Sets whether to use italic text. Only takes visual effect when a .ttf font has been set via setFont(FileHandle), since the default bitmap font does not support runtime style changes.
      Parameters:
      italic - Whether to use italic.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • isUnderline

      public boolean isUnderline()
      Returns whether underline is enabled.

    • setUnderline

      public FlixelText setUnderline(boolean underline)
      Sets whether to underline the text. This property is stored for API compatibility but visual rendering of underlines is limited.
      Parameters:
      underline - Whether to underline.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • getLetterSpacing

      public float getLetterSpacing()
      Returns the letter spacing in pixels.

    • setLetterSpacing

      public FlixelText setLetterSpacing(float letterSpacing)
      Sets the spacing between characters in pixels. Only takes visual effect when a .ttf font has been set via setFont(FileHandle), as FreeType uses this value during glyph generation.
      Parameters:
      letterSpacing - The spacing in pixels.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • isEmbedded

      public boolean isEmbedded()
      Returns whether this text uses a custom embedded font (true) or the default libGDX bitmap font (false). A font is considered embedded when set via setFont(FileHandle), setFont(String), or when a registry default is active.

    • getFontRegistryId

      public String getFontRegistryId()
      Returns the FlixelFontRegistry ID currently set on this text, or null if a direct FileHandle or the default font is used.

    • setFont

      public FlixelText setFont(String id)
      Sets the font by its FlixelFontRegistry identifier. The font must have been previously registered via FlixelFontRegistry.register(String, FileHandle). Pass null to clear the registry reference and fall back to the default resolution order (direct file -> registry default -> built-in font).
      Parameters:
      id - The registered font ID, or null to clear.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if id is non-null but not registered.

    • setFont

      public FlixelText setFont(com.badlogic.gdx.files.FileHandle fontFile)
      Sets a custom TrueType font file for this text. Uses FreeType to generate a bitmap font at the current size. Pass null to revert to the default font. This clears any previously set registry ID.
      Parameters:
      fontFile - The .ttf or .otf file handle, or null.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • setBitmapFont

      public FlixelText setBitmapFont(com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.g2d.BitmapFont font)
      Sets a pre-built BitmapFont directly, bypassing FreeType generation. This gives full control over font settings. The caller is responsible for the font's lifecycle if this text is destroyed or the font is replaced. Clears any previously set font file or registry ID.
      Parameters:
      font - The bitmap font to use. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if font is null.

    • getBorderStyle

      public FlixelText.BorderStyle getBorderStyle()
      Returns the current border style.

    • getBorderColor

      public com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color getBorderColor()
      Returns the border color.

    • getBorderSize

      public float getBorderSize()
      Returns the border size in pixels.

    • getBorderQuality

      public float getBorderQuality()
      Returns the border rendering quality.

    • setBorderStyle

      public FlixelText setBorderStyle(FlixelText.BorderStyle style, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color color, float size, float quality)
      Sets the border style, color, size, and quality in one call.
      Parameters:
      style - The border style.
      color - The border color in RGBA. Pass null for transparent.
      size - The border size in pixels.
      quality - Rendering quality. 0: single iteration, 1: one iteration per pixel in size.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • setBorderStyle

      public FlixelText setBorderStyle(FlixelText.BorderStyle style, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color color)
      Sets the border style and color with default size (1) and quality (1).
      Parameters:
      style - The border style.
      color - The border color.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • setBorderStyle

      public FlixelText setBorderStyle(FlixelText.BorderStyle style)
      Sets the border style with a default black color, size of 1, and quality of 1.
      Parameters:
      style - The border style.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • setFormat

      public FlixelText setFormat(com.badlogic.gdx.files.FileHandle fontFile, int size, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color color, FlixelText.Alignment alignment, FlixelText.BorderStyle borderStyle, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color borderColor)
      Convenience method to set many text properties at once. Pass null or 0 for any parameter to keep its current value.
      Parameters:
      fontFile - The .ttf/.otf font file, or null to keep current.
      size - The font size, or 0 to keep current.
      color - The text color, or null to keep current.
      alignment - The text alignment, or null to keep current.
      borderStyle - The border style, or null to keep current.
      borderColor - The border color, or null to keep current.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • setFormat

      public FlixelText setFormat(com.badlogic.gdx.files.FileHandle fontFile, int size, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color color)
      Simplified format setter with font file, size, and color.
      Parameters:
      fontFile - The font file, or null to keep current.
      size - The font size, or 0 to keep current.
      color - The text color, or null to keep current.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • setFormat

      public FlixelText setFormat(String fontId, int size, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color color, FlixelText.Alignment alignment, FlixelText.BorderStyle borderStyle, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color borderColor)
      Convenience format setter using a FlixelFontRegistry font ID. Pass null for any parameter to keep its current value.
      Parameters:
      fontId - The registered font ID, or null to keep current.
      size - The font size, or 0 to keep current.
      color - The text color, or null to keep current.
      alignment - The text alignment, or null to keep current.
      borderStyle - The border style, or null to keep current.
      borderColor - The border color, or null to keep current.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • setFormat

      Simplified format setter with a registry font ID, size, and color.
      Parameters:
      fontId - The registered font ID, or null to keep current.
      size - The font size, or 0 to keep current.
      color - The text color, or null to keep current.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • setFormat

      public FlixelText setFormat(int size, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color color)
      Simplified format setter with size and color only.
      Parameters:
      size - The font size, or 0 to keep current.
      color - The text color, or null to keep current.
      Returns:
      This instance for chaining.

    • getTextWidth

      public float getTextWidth()
      Returns the actual rendered width of the text content (which may differ from getFieldWidth() when a fixed field width is set). Triggers a layout rebuild if necessary.

    • getTextHeight

      public float getTextHeight()
      Returns the actual rendered height of the text content (which may differ from getFieldHeight() when a fixed field height is set). Triggers a layout rebuild if necessary.

    • update

      public final void update(float elapsed)
      Text objects do not use frame-based animation. This override prevents the animation state machine in FlixelSprite from running.
      Specified by:
      update in interface FlixelUpdatable
      Overrides:
      update in class FlixelSprite
      Parameters:
      elapsed - The amount of time that has passed since the last frame update.

    • draw

      public void draw(com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.g2d.Batch batch)
      Description copied from class: FlixelBasic
      Override this function to control how the object is drawn. Doing so is rarely necessary but can be very useful.
      Specified by:
      draw in interface FlixelDrawable
      Overrides:
      draw in class FlixelSprite
      Parameters:
      batch - The batch used for rendering.

    • setAntialiasing

      public void setAntialiasing(boolean antialiasing)
      Overrides:
      setAntialiasing in class FlixelSprite

    • loadGraphic

      public final FlixelSprite loadGraphic(com.badlogic.gdx.files.FileHandle path)
      Description copied from class: FlixelSprite
      Load's a texture and automatically resizes the size of this sprite.
      Overrides:
      loadGraphic in class FlixelSprite
      Parameters:
      path - The directory of the .png to load onto this sprite.
      Returns:
      this sprite for chaining.
      Throws:
      UnsupportedOperationException - always; text objects cannot load graphics.

    • loadGraphic

      public final FlixelSprite loadGraphic(com.badlogic.gdx.files.FileHandle path, int frameWidth)
      Description copied from class: FlixelSprite
      Load's a texture and automatically resizes the size of this sprite.
      Overrides:
      loadGraphic in class FlixelSprite
      Parameters:
      path - The directory of the .png to load onto this sprite.
      frameWidth - How wide the sprite should be.
      Returns:
      this sprite for chaining.
      Throws:
      UnsupportedOperationException - always; text objects cannot load graphics.

    • loadGraphic

      public final FlixelSprite loadGraphic(com.badlogic.gdx.files.FileHandle path, int frameWidth, int frameHeight)
      Description copied from class: FlixelSprite
      Load's a texture and automatically resizes the size of this sprite.
      Overrides:
      loadGraphic in class FlixelSprite
      Parameters:
      path - The directory of the .png to load onto this sprite.
      frameWidth - How wide the sprite should be.
      frameHeight - How tall the sprite should be.
      Returns:
      this sprite for chaining.
      Throws:
      UnsupportedOperationException - always; text objects cannot load graphics.

      this sprite for chaining.
      Throws:
      UnsupportedOperationException - always; text objects cannot load graphics.

    • applySparrowAtlas

      public final void applySparrowAtlas(@NotNull @NotNull FlixelGraphic newGraphic, @NotNull @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Array<FlixelFrame> parsedFrames)
      Description copied from class: FlixelSprite
      Installs a retained FlixelGraphic and parsed Sparrow atlas frames. Called by FlixelAnimationController.loadSparrowFrames(String, com.badlogic.gdx.utils.XmlReader.Element) only; not a general API for game code.
      Overrides:
      applySparrowAtlas in class FlixelSprite
      Parameters:
      newGraphic - Graphic wrapper already retain()ed by the caller.
      parsedFrames - Frames built from the XML (may be empty).
      Throws:
      UnsupportedOperationException - always; text objects cannot use Sparrow atlases.

    • getAtlasRegions

      public final com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Array<FlixelFrame> getAtlasRegions()
      Overrides:
      getAtlasRegions in class FlixelSprite
      Returns:
      null always; text has no atlas regions.

    • getCurrentFrame

      public final FlixelFrame getCurrentFrame()
      Overrides:
      getCurrentFrame in class FlixelSprite
      Returns:
      null always; text has no animation frames.

    • getFrames

      public final FlixelFrame[][] getFrames()
      Overrides:
      getFrames in class FlixelSprite
      Returns:
      null always; text has no image frames.

    • destroy

      public void destroy()
      Description copied from class: FlixelBasic
      Cleans up this object so it can be garbage-collected. A destroyed FlixelBasic should not be used anymore. Use FlixelBasic.kill() if you only want to disable it temporarily and FlixelBasic.revive() it later.

      Override this function to clean up any resources used by this object, such as textures, fonts, sounds, etc.

      This function is called automatically when FlixelBasic.dispose() or FlixelBasic.reset() is executed, so you don't need to call it manually.

      Specified by:
      destroy in interface FlixelDestroyable
      Overrides:
      destroy in class FlixelSprite
      See Also:
      • FlixelBasic.dispose()
      • FlixelBasic.reset()

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class FlixelObject
